sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49691" key="i)amboeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰαμβο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n49691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like an iambus</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
